column7: Enhances grain filling in salt-affected fields; split N application reduces salt-nitrogen interaction stress.
Supports saline-tolerant variety establishment; complete basal nutrition builds early stress resilience.
Provides N and S for salt-stressed plant recovery; supports protein synthesis under stress.
Improves saline stress tolerance; K application reduces Na accumulation in plant tissues.
Vitamin B complex supports metabolic recovery under salt stress; biostimulant improves root function in saline conditions.
Fungal component improves root function in saline soil; fulvic acid reduces salt toxicity on root membranes.
Organic mix supports halotolerant microbial activity; improves biological salt detoxification in saline paddy environment.
Azolla biomass improves CEC of saline soils; released organic acids may help reduce salt concentration near roots.
Foliar NPK supports plant nutrition when roots are impaired by salinity; rapid absorption maintains yield in salt-affected fields.
